## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, account numbers) committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
